description: Product Description Why Choose Us? Like Walking on The Clouds Every Step You Take Is Silent Previous page Next page 1 1 Great fashion piece 2 2 Luxury Plush 3 3 Memory Foam 4 4 Non-Slip Sole 5 5 Machine Washable Suit for Women of Various Styles Previous page Next page Bringing you warmth and beauty Previous page Next page -SIZE CHART- Is your shoe true to size? The slippers are true to size. If your feet are wide or you have high instep, it is recommended to choose one size up. Are this made with faux fur? Yes, they are made of fake fur. And they're very soft and warm! How do I clean them? These slippers can be machine washed. Machine wash in cold water to free your hands. Can I wear them outside? Yes, they are suitable for indoor and outdoor use. They have hard soles and would be fine if you wear outside.
